query: SELECT "public"."users"."user_id", "public"."users"."email", "public"."users"."preferred_name", "public"."users"."avatar_key", "public"."users"."created_at" FROM "public"."users" WHERE ("public"."users"."user_id" = $1 AND $4=$5) LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3

SELECT "public"."users"."user_id", "public"."users"."email", "public"."users"."password_hash", "public"."users"."preferred_name", "public"."users"."avatar_key", "public"."users"."created_at" FROM "public"."users" WHERE ("public"."users"."email" = $1 AND $4=$5) LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3
